texto: At my first Olympics, I didn't have a contract, and I wasn't making any money. After my first Olympics, I was working at 24 Hour Fitness at the front desk. I would go to practice in the morning, run home, shower, grab some food and then go straight to work. I didn't get off of work until 10 or 11 o'clock at night.
explicacao: Citação de Michelle Carter sobre temas ligados a negocios. “At my first Olympics, I didn't have a contract, and I wasn't making any money. After my first Oly…” articula negocios, work, morning em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e boa-noite.
